## Build Commands
- `npm run build` - Build the project
- `npm run test` - Run all tests
- `npm run lint:fix` - Fix linting issues

## Code Style
- Use TypeScript strict mode
- Prefer functional components over class components
- Always add JSDoc comments for public APIs

## Workflow
- If ask to complete a task or feature, check the `plan.md` in root directory first
- Run `npm run lint:fix && npm test` after making changes
- If Markdown files are using task format such as `- [ ]` then tick them as they are complete

## Git
- Only use `git add`. Don't use `git commit`
